case_study: Led the full marketing and public relations strategy for WolfHacks 2026, a student-led hackathon organized by the Chinguacousy SciTech Activity Committee Chinguacousy SciTech Activity Committee.  WolfHacks 2026 brought together 300+ students from across the Peel Region to solve real-world healthcare challenges using technology and AI. As Director of Marketing & PR, I was responsible for building the event’s entire public identity and outreach system from the ground up.  My role included designing the complete visual branding system (posters, social media templates, banners, certificates, and promotional assets), managing digital campaigns across platforms, and coordinating outreach to 200+ students, schools, mentors, judges, and organizations.  I also supported the development and maintenance of the WolfHacks website, created content calendars, structured internal marketing workflows, and produced promotional and recap media to maximize engagement before, during, and after the event.  Through consistent branding, structured outreach, and high-volume content production, the campaign significantly increased participation, strengthened sponsor engagement, and helped position WolfHacks as one of the key STEM hackathons in the region.
description: Comprehensive marketing and PR campaign for WolfHacks 2026, a student-led hackathon focused on STEM, AI, and healthcare innovation, including branding, social media strategy, outreach, and event promotion.
title: Wolfhacks 2026 Marketing Campagin
content: WolfHacks 2026 was a large-scale student-led hackathon focused on healthcare innovation, AI, and STEM problem-solving. As Marketing Director, I led branding, outreach, and digital strategy to drive participation and engagement across schools in the Peel Region.
problem: Low-to-moderate awareness and engagement for a large-scale student hackathon, requiring increased outreach to students, schools, mentors, and sponsors across the Peel Region.
solution: Designed and executed a full marketing strategy including branding, multi-platform social media campaigns, outreach to 200+ students and organizations, promotional content creation, and website development to maximize participation and visibility.

seo_title: WolfHacks 2026 Marketing Campaign | STEM Hackathon Branding & Outreach
tagline: Led full-scale branding, outreach, and digital marketing for WolfHacks 2026 hackathon, engaging 300+ students across the Peel Region.
